title: Everything Everywhere All At Once
logline: A middle-aged Chinese immigrant woman struggling with her laundromat business and family relationships discovers she must connect with parallel universe versions of herself to stop an omniversal threat—her own daughter.
antagonistOrConflict: Jobu Tupaki (Joy Wang) and the existential threat of the Everything Bagel / Evelyn's fractured relationship with her daughter
tone: Chaotic, absurdist, emotionally raw, kinetic, genre-blending—oscillates between frenetic multiverse action and intimate family drama
themes: The burden of unfulfilled potential and regret
Finding meaning in chaos and nihilism
The multiverse as metaphor for life's infinite possibilities and paralysis

actBreaks.description: Evelyn fully enters the multiverse conflict when she witnesses Jobu Tupaki's power in the closet universe and Alpha Waymond explains the stakes.

validation.ruling: Scene #34 shows Waymond pulling Evelyn into a stairwell after running past guards—a transitional escape moment. Scene #27 (p28, 22%) is the true Act 1 break where Jobu Tupaki first appears, Evelyn witnesses impossible multiverse chaos, and the story irreversibly escalates from mundane tax audit to cosmic threat.

actBreaks.description: Evelyn reaches peak nihilism in the Rock Universe, accepting meaninglessness before choosing to fight for connection instead of oblivion.

validation.ruling: Scene #94 shows Evelyn swallowing a frog paperweight to verse-jump into Sign Spinner Universe, witnessing her failed Olympic dreams—a major turning point where she fully embraces multiverse jumping and begins her transformation into a warrior capable of accessing any universe at will.

naturalStructure.structuralPersonality:
This script operates as a controlled explosion. Act 1 establishes Evelyn's mundane chaos—tax audit, family tensions, laundromat struggles—then detonates into multiverse madness around scene 14-17 when Alpha Waymond hijacks the elevator. The structure is deliberately fragmented: scenes splinter into split-screens, universes bleed into each other, and the protagonist's consciousness fractures across realities. This isn't traditional three-act so much as a spiral—Evelyn keeps circling the same emotional wounds (her disappointment in Joy, her failed dreams, her crumbling marriage) while the external reality becomes increasingly unhinged.

The second act is a sustained crescendo of absurdist action and existential despair, climaxing in the Rock Universe conversation (scene 94) where the script strips away all spectacle to confront pure meaninglessness. The final act inverts the chaos: instead of learning to fight across universes, Evelyn learns to heal across them, turning her multiverse-jumping ability into radical empathy. The structure mirrors its theme—life is overwhelming, fractured, and absurd, but connection is the only response that matters.
naturalStructure.pacingNotes: The pacing is relentless and intentionally exhausting. The first 13 scenes establish domestic chaos in rapid cuts before the elevator hijacking (scene 14) launches the multiverse premise. From scenes 16-87, the script maintains breakneck momentum through split-screens, universe-hopping, and escalating action set pieces (the IRS fight sequences from scenes 27-87 are essentially one extended, reality-bending chase). The script deliberately overwhelms the audience to mirror Evelyn's experience. Scene 94 (Rock Universe) provides the only true pause—a philosophical breather before the emotional climax. The final 30 scenes shift from frenetic action to emotional resolution, slowing down to let character moments breathe while maintaining multiverse spectacle.

incitingIncident.description: Waymond's head snaps forward in the elevator; he covers the security camera with an umbrella, puts bluetooth earpieces in Evelyn's ears, tells her she's in grave danger, instructs her not to go into the janitor's closet, then pulls out divorce papers and asks her to sign them.

validation.ruling: Scene #14 (IRS elevator) shatters Evelyn's ordinary world when Alpha Waymond reveals she's in grave danger, forces bluetooth devices in her ears that scan alternate life paths, and instructs her about the janitor's closet—launching the multiverse conflict that drives the entire story.

midpoint.description: Alpha Waymond tries to wake up in the IRS building and warns not to engage with Jobu because she can't be reasoned with.
midpoint.sceneHeading: 59 ALPHAVERSE: INT. LAUNDRY RV CONTROL ROOM 59

validation.ruling: Scene #69 is merely Alpha Waymond warning Evelyn not to engage—a brief transitional moment. Scene #81 (p73, 58%) is the true midpoint where Evelyn actively chooses to verse-jump into multiple lives to fight Jobu, shifting from reactive victim to proactive multiverse warrior, demonstrating mastery of powers and commitment to the conflict.

climax.description: Evelyn tells Waymond it's too late, but he insists she not say that; she looks at her bleeding husband as romantic music begins to play, then turns away from the Bagel and hugs Waymond hard.

validation.ruling: Scene #118 shows Waymond sweeping alone while Evelyn contemplates—setup, not confrontation. Scene #120 (p105, 83%) is the climax where Evelyn faces the ultimate choice: join Jobu in the Bagel's nihilism or choose love, then turns away from the Bagel to embrace bleeding Waymond, resolving the central conflict through her defining choice.

scenes.heading: 1 INT. APARTMENT - DINING ROOM/LIVING ROOM - NIGHT 1
scenes.summary: The Wang family sings karaoke together in their apartment, awkwardly performing 'Barbie Girl' before the scene abruptly cuts away.

scenes.heading: 2 INT. APARTMENT - DINING ROOM/LIVING ROOM - MORNING 2
scenes.summary: Evelyn sits frozen with indecision over tax receipts in her chaotic dining room until Waymond playfully tosses a receipt into a pile.

scenes.heading: 3 INT. LAUNDROMAT - THAT MOMENT 3
scenes.summary: Joy stares blankly at a laundry machine until Becky kisses her, then Joy adjusts Becky's appearance to hide her tattoos and side shave.

scenes.heading: 4 INT. APARTMENT - DINING ROOM/LIVING ROOM - THAT MOMENT 4
scenes.summary: Evelyn rushes upstairs as Joy and Becky arrive; Waymond explains Becky will watch Gong Gong during the audit, and Evelyn hands Joy bowls while straightening her posture.

scenes.heading: 5 INT. APARTMENT - STAIRCASE - CONTINUOUS 5
scenes.summary: Evelyn rushes down the stairs with Joy following, telling her there's no time to wait today.

scenes.heading: 6 INT. LAUNDROMAT - CONTINUOUS 6
scenes.summary: Evelyn tells Joy she's too busy today and explains she likes Becky but doesn't think Gong Gong's heart could handle learning about their relationship, especially after Joy's failed piano recital.

scenes.heading: 7 INT. APARTMENT - DINING ROOM/LIVING ROOM - MOMENTS LATER 7
scenes.summary: Evelyn and Joy re-enter the apartment where Evelyn rips googly eyes off items while complaining about Waymond and expressing frustration that she doesn't understand him after all these years.

scenes.heading: 8 INT. LAUNDROMAT - CONTINUOUS 8
scenes.summary: Evelyn watches Rick dance to an old musical while Waymond laughs and suggests she audition for community theater; she experiences a flash of longing watching the screen lovers, then hands Waymond the Dog Mom's laundry.

scenes.heading: 9 EXT. LAUNDROMAT - THAT MOMENT 9
scenes.summary: Evelyn hands laundry to Debbie the Dog Mom, asks for five stars, invites her to a Chinese New Year party, then calls out to Joy.

scenes.heading: 10 INT. APARTMENT - STAIRCASE - LATER 10
scenes.summary: Evelyn patiently stands with her father as he slowly climbs the stairs one step at a time, revealing her exhaustion.

scenes.heading: 11 INT. APARTMENT - DINING ROOM/LIVING ROOM - LATER 11
scenes.summary: Evelyn tries to work on taxes while Gong Gong slurps noodles beside her; she freezes holding a receipt as a deep rumbling sound fills her head and soul.
scenes.turningPointNote: First supernatural/existential intrusion - the rumbling marks the beginning of Evelyn's awareness of something beyond her ordinary reality

scenes.heading: 12 INT. LAUNDRY RV 12
scenes.summary: Evelyn drives the laundry RV with Waymond holding cookies and Gong Gong muttering about the Japanese in his sleep; Evelyn turns on the radio.

scenes.heading: 13 INT. IRS BUILDING LOBBY - LATER 13
scenes.summary: Evelyn and Waymond push Gong Gong through IRS security; Evelyn lies to Gong Gong in Cantonese that they're applying for a business license to expand, shocking Waymond.

scenes.heading: 14 INT. IRS ELEVATOR - THAT MOMENT 14
scenes.summary: Waymond's head snaps forward in the elevator; he covers the security camera with an umbrella, puts bluetooth earpieces in Evelyn's ears, tells her she's in grave danger, instructs her not to go into the janitor's closet, then pulls out divorce papers and asks her to sign them.
scenes.turningPointNote: Alpha Waymond makes first contact - the multiverse plot is initiated and Evelyn is given her first impossible choice

scenes.heading: 14 BACK IN THE ELEVATOR: Evelyn watches, overwhelmed. 14
scenes.summary: Evelyn experiences rapid flashes of memories: leaving home with Waymond against Gong Gong's wishes, opening the laundromat, leaving voicemails for her father, watching customers in time-lapse, vomiting in the sink, and looking down at baby Joy.

scenes.heading: 15 INT. IRS 10TH FLOOR CUBICLE - MOMENTS LATER 15
scenes.summary: Evelyn reads crumpled instructions under the desk telling her to switch shoes to the wrong feet while Deirdre asks if she can explain a receipt with a red sticky note.

scenes.heading: 16 SPLIT SCREEN: INT. JANITOR'S CLOSET / CUBICLE - THAT MOMENT 16
scenes.summary: Evelyn appears in split-screen, half in a cluttered janitor's closet and half still in the tax audit, looking around in confusion.

scenes.heading: INT. CUBICLE:
scenes.summary: Evelyn asks what is happening while Deirdre expresses frustration that she feels like she's talking to her ex-husband.

scenes.heading: 16 INT. JANITOR’S CLOSET: Someone grabs Evelyn and turns her 16
scenes.summary: Alpha Waymond grabs Evelyn in the janitor's closet, tells her to be quiet and relax into auto-pilot.

scenes.heading: INT. CUBICLE: Evelyn tries an innocent smile towards her
scenes.summary: Evelyn tries an innocent smile toward her concerned husband while Deirdre continues to ramble.

scenes.heading: 16 INT. JANITOR’S CLOSET: [split screen slides away] 16
scenes.summary: Alpha Waymond explains he's another version of Waymond from another universe searching for someone who can help fight a great evil spreading chaos throughout the multiverse.

scenes.heading: INT. CUBICLE: Alpha Waymond’s voice fades away and the split-
scenes.summary: Deirdre warns Evelyn that nothing could matter more than their conversation about tax liability and reminds her there's a lien on her property with repossession within their rights.

scenes.heading: 16 INT. JANITOR'S CLOSET: Evelyn's attention is back in the 16
scenes.summary: Alpha Waymond tells Evelyn that nothing could matter more than their conversation about the fate of the infinite multiverse and says he knows she fears she might have made the wrong choice.

scenes.heading: INT. CUBICLE: [SPLIT SCREEN] Evelyn smiles.
scenes.summary: Evelyn is simultaneously questioned by Deirdre, Gong Gong, and Alpha Waymond in split-screen while Waymond begins talking to Deirdre.

scenes.heading: 16 INT. JANITOR'S CLOSET: A loud BOOM shakes the door. Someone 16
scenes.summary: A loud boom shakes the closet door as someone tries to break in; Alpha Waymond calmly explains this is a burner universe for communication before fists burst through the door and snap his neck.

scenes.heading: 17 INT. IRS 10TH FLOOR - CUBICLE 17
scenes.summary: Evelyn's head snaps to the side as she leaps to her feet screaming, then realizes she's still in the audit with everyone staring at her; she sits down and the instructions fall from her pocket.

scenes.heading: 18 INT. IRS 10TH FLOOR - MOMENTS LATER 18
scenes.summary: Evelyn pushes Gong Gong toward the elevator while Waymond catches up holding divorce papers; Evelyn sees Deirdre charging toward them, grabs the papers, throws them at Waymond, and shoves Gong Gong into the elevator.

scenes.heading: 19 CLOSET UNIVERSE: INT. IRS 10TH FLOOR 19
scenes.summary: In the closet universe, Deirdre with a bagel symbol on her forehead addresses hostages and announces the arrival of Jobu Tupaki; a figure's hand runs along a cubicle wall causing objects on the other side to spontaneously change.
scenes.turningPointNote: Jobu Tupaki's first appearance and demonstration of reality-warping power - the primary antagonist enters the story

scenes.heading: 20 INT. DIVE BAR - AFTERNOON 20
scenes.summary: Jobu sits in a dive bar watching IRS news coverage on TV; when Becky speaks to her, Jobu stands and marches toward the door, revealing herself to be Joy before leaving.
scenes.turningPointNote: Revelation that Jobu Tupaki is Joy - the external threat and family conflict merge into one

scenes.heading: 21 INT. IRS 10TH FLOOR - LATER 21
scenes.summary: Alpha Waymond pulls Evelyn through the hallway past frantic civilians; he explains how small decisions create branching universes before spotting guards and yanking Evelyn into an office.

scenes.heading: 22 INT. IRS 10TH FLOOR OFFICE - CONTINUOUS 22
scenes.summary: Evelyn wants to go back for her father but Alpha Waymond shows her a map of thousands of universes, explains verse jumping, and reveals that in the Alphaverse she was a brilliant woman most people thought was crazy.

scenes.heading: 23 ALPHAVERSE: INT. LAUNDRY RV CONTROL ROOM 23
scenes.summary: In the Alphaverse, Alpha Waymond sits in a chair with wires flowing from every angle while Alpha Officers operate equipment in a laundry RV control room; he looks at a shrine for Evelyn with candles, an urn, and her portrait.

scenes.heading: 24 INT. IRS 10TH FLOOR OFFICE - PRESENT UNIVERSE 24
scenes.summary: Alpha Waymond explains verse jumping to Evelyn and tells her she needs to learn how to do it right now as their only chance of getting out alive; he finds chewed gum under the desk and pops it in his mouth.

scenes.heading: 25 INT. IRS 10TH FLOOR - CONTINUOUS 25
scenes.summary: Waymond swings open the office door, grabs the screaming Evelyn, and joins a group of frantic civilians running past two armed guards before pulling her into a stairwell.

scenes.heading: 26 INT. IRS STAIRWELL 26
scenes.summary: Evelyn asks how she died; Alpha Waymond reveals he's seen her die a thousand ways in a thousand worlds, murdered every time by Jobu Tupaki, an evil omniversal being with unimaginable power.

scenes.heading: 27 INT. IRS 8TH FLOOR CORRIDOR 27
scenes.summary: Evelyn suggests letting Jobu destroy other universes, but Alpha Waymond explains Jobu is building something they can all feel, describing how everything feels slightly wrong in Evelyn's daily life.

scenes.heading: 28 INT. IRS 8TH FLOOR - CUBICLES 28
scenes.summary: Deirdre confronts Evelyn and Alpha Waymond; she staples a post-it note to her forehead, her headsets turn green, and she verse jumps, then slams the stairwell door shut and flips a table with incredible strength.

scenes.heading: 29 ALPHAVERSE: INT. LAUNDRY RV CONTROL ROOM 29
scenes.summary: In the Alphaverse control room, Alpha Officers identify that Deirdre jumped to a brute force universe and Alpha Waymond orders them to counter with a gymnast.

scenes.heading: 30 INT. IRS 8TH FLOOR 30
scenes.summary: Alpha Waymond tries to give himself paper cuts while running from Deirdre; frustrated, he kneels to focus and successfully cuts himself four times, turning his bluetooth green.

scenes.heading: 31 ALPHAVERSE: INT. LAUNDRY RV CONTROL ROOM 31
scenes.summary: Alpha Officers observe that Deirdre is going for a pro wrestling backbreaker move.

scenes.heading: 32 INT. IRS 8TH FLOOR 32
scenes.summary: Alpha Waymond grabs an exit sign as Deirdre tries to backbreaker him, slipping the sign between his spine and her knee; the sign shatters and Deirdre drop kicks him down a stairwell before blocking the door with filing cabinets.

scenes.heading: 33 ALPHAVERSE: INT. LAUNDRY RV CONTROL ROOM 33
scenes.summary: Alpha Officers say Evelyn needs to run, but Alpha Waymond insists she can jump to somewhere she can fight despite warnings it would fry most people's brains.

scenes.heading: 34 INT. IRS 8TH FLOOR STAIRWAY HALLWAY 34
scenes.summary: Alpha Waymond pushes against the cabinets blocking the stairway door but they won't budge; he is weak again like regular Waymond.

scenes.heading: 35 INT. IRS 8TH FLOOR 35
scenes.summary: Evelyn picks up two bluetooth earpieces from the floor and places them in her ears; Alpha Waymond tells her to concentrate on a universe where she studied martial arts.

scenes.heading: 36 ALPHAVERSE: INT. LAUNDRY RV CONTROL ROOM 36
scenes.summary: In the Alphaverse control room, images flash onscreen of kung fu masters, a crying baby, and a deer in headlights as Alpha Officers prepare to calculate a route.

scenes.heading: 37 INT. IRS 8TH FLOOR 37
scenes.summary: Alpha Waymond tells Evelyn she must profess her love to Deirdre to verse jump, comparing it to eating chapstick or switching shoes.

scenes.heading: 38 ALPHAVERSE: INT. LAUNDRY RV CONTROL ROOM 38
scenes.summary: Onscreen displays show Point A (current verse), Point C (fighter verse), and Point B (the universe where Evelyn professes love to her attacker) along a highlighted route calculated by the Stochastic Path Algorithm.

scenes.heading: 39 INT. IRS 8TH FLOOR 39
scenes.summary: Evelyn crawls through cubicles as Deirdre stalks her; Alpha Waymond explains the algorithm is fueled by random actions and the alternatives are breaking her own arm or taking a nap; Deirdre's foot appears in front of Evelyn's face and Evelyn meekly says she loves her.

scenes.heading: 40 TAXES UNIVERSE: INT. LAUNDRY RV [SPLIT SCREEN] 40
scenes.summary: Evelyn finds herself in the laundry RV with Waymond, spots divorce papers in her lap, and realizes this isn't the universe she wanted to jump to; a flash shows the elevator moment where she refused Alpha Waymond's umbrella.

scenes.heading: 41 ALPHAVERSE: INT. LAUNDRY RV CONTROL ROOM 41
scenes.summary: (no summary)

scenes.heading: 42 INT. IRS 8TH FLOOR [SPLIT SCREEN] 42
scenes.summary: Evelyn tries to punch Deirdre but Deirdre catches her wrist, twists it, and slaps her repeatedly while laughing.

scenes.heading: 43 TAXES UNIVERSE: INT. LAUNDRY RV [SPLIT SCREEN] 43
scenes.summary: Waymond explains to Evelyn that he wants to discuss divorce because talking helped Byron and his wife, while Evelyn's face is red with pain and an arm grabs something off-screen.

scenes.heading: 44 INT. IRS 8TH FLOOR 44
scenes.summary: Deirdre grapples Evelyn through a cubicle wall, disconnecting her bluetooth, and Alpha Waymond tells Evelyn he needs to find the right Evelyn as she's not the one.

scenes.heading: 45 INT. IRS STAIRWELL 45
scenes.summary: Waymond notices Evelyn's battered, bleeding face and she tells him he left her, while he asks if she means the divorce, causing her bluetooth to malfunction.

scenes.heading: 46 TAXES UNIVERSE: EXT. LAUNDROMAT 46
scenes.summary: Waymond tells Evelyn they might have been better off never marrying based on how she looks at him, and the car door is ripped off.

scenes.heading: 47 INT. STAIRWELL 47
scenes.summary: Deirdre rips the door off and Evelyn desperately shouts 'I love you' multiple times until her bluetooth turns yellow, then she and Waymond run down the stairs as Deirdre leaps after them.

scenes.heading: 48 MOVIE STAR UNIVERSE: INT. LIMOUSINE 48
scenes.summary: Evelyn downloads memories in a limousine showing her choice between leaving with young Waymond or staying with her family, following the universe where she left.

scenes.heading: 48 MOVIE STAR UNIVERSE: INT. LIMOUSINE - She’s back. She looks 48
scenes.summary: Evelyn performs a poetic kung fu dance with her Master over a cookie, nearly grabbing it but failing, and the Master tells her she's proud.

scenes.heading: 49 INT. IRS - STAIRWELL - ORIGINAL UNIVERSE 49
scenes.summary: Evelyn sidesteps Deirdre's attack, slams her to the ground, dodges further advances, and sends Deirdre tumbling down the stairs through drywall until she goes limp.
scenes.turningPointNote: Evelyn successfully uses verse-jumping combat abilities for the first time, defeating Deirdre

scenes.heading: 50 INT. IRS - CONFERENCE ROOM 50
scenes.summary: Alpha Waymond leads Evelyn into a conference room and tends to their wounds while explaining her brain is under stress and she's not thinking straight.

scenes.heading: 51 MOVIE STAR UNIVERSE: INT. LIMOUSINE 51
scenes.summary: Evelyn sees herself at a movie premiere with red carpet, screaming fans, and flashing lights before Alpha Waymond's voice calls her back.

scenes.heading: 52 INT. IRS - CONFERENCE ROOM - ORIGINAL UNIVERSE 52
scenes.summary: Alpha Waymond slaps Evelyn and explains that each jump cracks her mind like a clay pot, causing universes to leak through, while feeding her and describing his universe's loss of cattle.

scenes.heading: 53 VARIOUS UNIVERSES: JOBU TUPAKI'S WALK 53
scenes.summary: Jobu Tupaki walks through multiple universes with each step, experiencing every world simultaneously, then stops outside the IRS building in their universe.

scenes.heading: 54 INT. IRS - CONFERENCE ROOM 54
scenes.summary: Alpha Waymond explains that Jobu has lost all morality and belief in objective truth, then tells Evelyn she was incredible and that he's changed his mind about her being the wrong one.

scenes.heading: 55 MOVIE STAR UNIVERSE: INT. MOVIE THEATER 55
scenes.summary: Evelyn sees Waymond in the crowd at her movie premiere and they walk toward each other through the crowd, both trying to speak at once.

scenes.heading: 56 INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR - ORIGINAL UNIVERSE 56
scenes.summary: Police detain Evelyn while others struggle with Alpha Waymond, who tells her to jump by peeing herself before an officer knocks him unconscious.

scenes.heading: 57 ALPHAVERSE: INT. LAUNDRY RV CONTROL ROOM 57
scenes.summary: Alpha Waymond watches screens in horror and urges Evelyn to run.

scenes.heading: 58 INT. IRS 10TH FLOOR - ORIGINAL UNIVERSE 58
scenes.summary: Jobu Tupaki emerges from the elevator in an Elvis jumpsuit with a pig, puts out her cigarette on an officer's badge, and causes chaos by tapping his shoe and making him kick himself unconscious.
scenes.turningPointNote: Jobu Tupaki arrives in person, demonstrating her reality-warping multiverse powers

scenes.heading: 59 ALPHAVERSE: INT. LAUNDRY RV CONTROL ROOM 59
scenes.summary: Alpha Waymond tries to wake up in the IRS building and warns not to engage with Jobu because she can't be reasoned with.

scenes.heading: 60 INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR - ORIGINAL UNIVERSE 60
scenes.summary: Evelyn accuses Jobu of being why Joy dropped out, gets tattoos, and thinks she's gay, while Jobu reveals she's done everything across universes and shows Evelyn photos of herself with Deirdre, a dog, and a car.

scenes.heading: 60 BACK IN THE IRS: Evelyn backs up against a wall. 60
scenes.summary: Evelyn pees herself to trigger a jump, her bluetooth flickers, her handcuffs slide off, and she tries to punch Jobu with floppy anesthetized fingers that bounce off her face.

scenes.heading: 61 ALPHAVERSE: INT. LAUNDRY RV CONTROL ROOM 61
scenes.summary: Alpha Waymond asks where Evelyn jumped and an officer reports she's off the map.

scenes.heading: 62 HOTDOG UNIVERSE: INT. LAUNDROMAT 62
scenes.summary: Evelyn finds herself in a laundromat with Deirdre watching TV where lovers with hot dog fingers perform a love ritual, and Evelyn shrieks at her own hot dog hands.

scenes.heading: 63 ALPHAVERSE: INT. LAUNDRY RV CONTROL ROOM 63
scenes.summary: An officer reports Evelyn is in a universe where everyone has hot dogs instead of fingers and discusses it as an evolutionary branch.

scenes.heading: 64 EXT. ROCKY DESERT (ALA 2001 A SPACE ODYSSEY) 64
scenes.summary: A monkey with hot dog fingers murders a normal-fingered monkey while other monkeys whoop and scream.

scenes.heading: 65 INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR HALLWAY 65
scenes.summary: Evelyn stumbles with useless hot dog fingers and crumples to the floor while Jobu tells her she's starting to get it.

scenes.heading: 66 HOTDOG UNIVERSE: INT. LAUNDROMAT 66
scenes.summary: The hot dog couple on TV place their fingers in each other's mouths with ketchup and mustard oozing down their lips.

scenes.heading: 67 INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR HALLWAY - ORIGINAL UNIVERSE 67
scenes.summary: Jobu performs the hand vagina trick with Evelyn and shows her a bagel-shaped black hole she made from everything, explaining nothing matters and inviting Evelyn to step into it.
scenes.turningPointNote: Jobu reveals the Everything Bagel and her nihilistic philosophy, the central existential threat

scenes.heading: 69 INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR EXECUTIVE OFFICE - MOMENTS LATER 69
scenes.summary: Alpha Gong Gong barricades the door and tells Alpha Waymond that Evelyn wasn't ready and they must do what's necessary, while Evelyn realizes Jobu is possessing her daughter Joy.

scenes.heading: 70 ALPHAVERSE: INT. LAUNDRY RV CONTROL ROOM 70
scenes.summary: Jobu appears in the road and Alpha Gong Gong orders them not to engage and run as the RV violently swerves.

scenes.heading: 71 INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR EXECUTIVE OFFICE - MOMENTS LATER 71
scenes.summary: Alpha Waymond asks Alpha Gong Gong to watch Evelyn and Waymond while he deals with Jobu, but Alpha Gong Gong refuses and disconnects, then Joy arrives and Evelyn frantically tapes her to a chair.

scenes.heading: 72 JANITOR UNIVERSE: INT. IRS BUILDING - EXECUTIVE OFFICE 72
scenes.summary: Janitor Evelyn in another universe receives a tip from the District Manager and his dominatrix, then spits into a bottle of fancy whiskey and smiles.

scenes.heading: 73 INT. IRS BUILDING - EXECUTIVE OFFICE 73
scenes.summary: Evelyn pushes a button to open a secret door, smashes a whiskey bottle into Alpha Gong Gong's gun, and locks her family in the panic room.

scenes.heading: 74 ALPHAVERSE: INT. ALPHAVERSE HQ 74
scenes.summary: Alpha Gong Gong orders all jumpers with counterparts in the area to be sent as Alpha Jumpers connect to jumping stations.

scenes.heading: 75 EXT. IRS BUILDING 75
scenes.summary: Debbie the Dog Mom and other civilians are possessed and walk toward the IRS building.

scenes.heading: 76 INT. IRS - PANIC ROOM 76
scenes.summary: The family is in a panic room filled with kinky items and Evelyn tells Joy that her sadness isn't her fault but is caused by Jobu possessing her soul.

scenes.heading: 77 INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR EXECUTIVE OFFICE - THAT MOMENT 77
scenes.summary: Alpha Jumpers demand Evelyn surrender and hand over her daughter or they will remove her from the universe.

scenes.heading: 78 INT. IRS - PANIC ROOM 78
scenes.summary: Evelyn experiences sensations from multiple universes simultaneously like a million nerve endings growing further and further.

scenes.heading: 79 INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR EXECUTIVE OFFICE 79
scenes.summary: Alpha Jumpers in gas masks toss tear gas into the ceiling vents and Alpha Gong Gong rolls out of the room.

scenes.heading: 80 INT. IRS - PANIC ROOM 80
scenes.summary: As gas seeps in, Evelyn sticks a vibrating feather toy into Joy's nose to trigger a jump, causing her bluetooth to flash green.

scenes.heading: 81 INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR EXECUTIVE OFFICE 81
scenes.summary: All the gas mask Alpha Jumpers begin doing random stupid things like ripping out hair and sitting on copiers as green devices flash across the room.

scenes.heading: 82 INT. IRS SECRET SEX CLOSET 82
scenes.summary: Evelyn downloads memories from Opera Universe showing her childhood accident that blinded her and her career as an opera singer.

scenes.heading: 83 [SPLIT SCREEN] INT. IRS EXECUTIVE OFFICE / OPERA HOUSE 83
scenes.summary: Blind opera singer Evelyn sustains a note while original Evelyn dodges attacks with eyes closed, rips off gas masks for her family, gets kicked, and disconnects as she hits the wall.

scenes.heading: 84 INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR EXECUTIVE OFFICE 84
scenes.summary: Evelyn swallows a frog paperweight to jump and downloads memories of being a failed gymnast who became a sign spinner.

scenes.heading: 84 BACK IN THE IRS: A SWAT Officer charges with a riot shield. 84
scenes.summary: Evelyn steals a riot shield and spins it like a sign spinner, blocking bullets and knocking over foes, then smashes it into a final jumper as Waymond and Joy watch.

scenes.heading: 85 INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR ATRIUM 85
scenes.summary: The family hurries through the atrium when Debbie's dog attacks Evelyn, who traps it in a fridge and runs as Debbie swings the dog like a weapon.

scenes.heading: 85 BACK IN THE IRS: She bends backwards, grabs a spatula and a 85
scenes.summary: Evelyn grabs a spatula and cake knife, slices the dog's leash, and flicks an egg timer into Debbie's forehead, knocking her unconscious.

scenes.heading: 85 BACK IN THE IRS BUILDING: Evelyn turns to see an Alpha I.T. 85
scenes.summary: An Alpha I.T. Guy attacks with pipes, destroying Evelyn's weapons, then both disconnect and fight over a butt plug trophy as the I.T. Guy tries to use it as a jumping pad before an Alpha Receptionist attacks.

scenes.heading: 86 ALPHAVERSE: INT. LAUNDRY RV CONTROL ROOM 86
scenes.summary: Jobu steps into the flipped RV where Alpha Waymond is alone and all equipment shuts down as she puts a finger to his lips.

scenes.heading: 87 INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR ATRIUM 87
scenes.summary: Alpha Waymond tells Evelyn to be careful and not let chaos destroy her beliefs, then goes to kiss her but his eyes roll back, his head goes limp, and Waymond returns confused as Jobu applauds and Evelyn drunkenly vows to stop her.
scenes.turningPointNote: Alpha Waymond is killed/disconnected by Jobu, eliminating Evelyn's guide and leaving her alone against Jobu

scenes.heading: 87 ACTION UNIVERSE: INT. IRS BUILDING - On Waymond’s phone, 87
scenes.summary: Evelyn's mental map of the multiverse spreads further across universes, then abruptly stops.

scenes.heading: 88 TAXES UNIVERSE: INT. APARTMENT - DINING ROOM/LIVING ROOM 88
scenes.summary: Evelyn stabilizes in the Taxes Universe, confirming she succeeded in verse-jumping, while Waymond hands her cookies for Deirdre and tells her to drop off paperwork before the party.

scenes.heading: 89 TAXES UNIVERSE: INT. LAUNDROMAT 89
scenes.summary: Evelyn enters the laundromat to find a men's choir singing, Waymond greeting them with a dragon costume, and Joy arriving with Becky to talk about the morning's events.

scenes.heading: 90 VARIOUS UNIVERSES: 90
scenes.summary: Scene heading only, no dialogue or action content provided.

scenes.heading: EXT. FOREST: Evelyn and Joy are now in a forest. Evelyn nods.
scenes.summary: In a forest universe, Jobu turns a branch into a katana and explains to Evelyn how everything is a random rearrangement of particles in a vibrating superposition.

scenes.heading: INT. JAILHOUSE: Jobu’s the cop. Evelyn’s the escaped inmate.
scenes.summary: In a jailhouse universe where Jobu is a cop and Evelyn an escaped inmate, Evelyn grabs a mop and swings it overhead.

scenes.heading: EXT. IRISH FJORD: Viking Evelyn is now wielding an axe
scenes.summary: Viking Evelyn wields an axe against Jobu's katana, and Jobu plunges her katana into her own stomach, causing candy to spill out instead of blood.

scenes.heading: EXT. BACKYARD: They are now Jobu-shaped and Evelyn-shaped
scenes.summary: As piñatas shaped like Jobu and Evelyn hanging from trees, they are hit by unseen children while Jobu explains that everything gets washed away in a sea of every other possibility.

scenes.heading: 91 TAXES UNIVERSE: INT. APARTMENT - DINING ROOM/LIVING ROOM 91
scenes.summary: Evelyn reacts as if hit in the face, shaking off piñata tissue, then declares herself the one who will defeat Jobu, but when she punches Jobu they flash through multiple universes and Evelyn winces in pain from hitting herself; Waymond enters asking what's happening.

scenes.heading: 92 TEMPLE UNIVERSE: INT. EMPRESS HALL 92
scenes.summary: In a temple universe, Jobu's followers force Evelyn toward the Everything Bagel while Bagel Deirdre explains that Jobu has brought peace by removing passion and self-righteousness, but Evelyn argues their beliefs give them something to live for.
scenes.turningPointNote: First direct confrontation with the Bagel and its followers; Evelyn faces the existential threat physically

scenes.heading: 93 VARIOUS UNIVERSES: STARING INTO THE BAGEL 93
scenes.summary: Evelyn experiences the meaninglessness of all her lives swirling in the Bagel while simultaneously greeting party guests on autopilot, missing Deirdre's call, lying dead in the Action Universe, staring at Deirdre in the Hot Dog Universe, and reminiscing with CEO Waymond about what if they'd had a daughter together.

scenes.heading: 94 ROCK UNIVERSE: EXT. FIELD 94
scenes.summary: Two rocks sit in an empty field in a universe where life never formed; Jobu Rock tells Evelyn Rock to just be a rock and stop worrying, explaining that all humans are small and stupid.
scenes.turningPointNote: Evelyn reaches the nihilistic endpoint with Jobu in the Rock Universe, a moment of existential surrender

scenes.heading: 95 EMPRESS UNIVERSE: INT. TEMPLE 95
scenes.summary: Jobu reveals she built the Bagel to destroy herself and asks Evelyn to enter it with her so she doesn't have to die alone, while Evelyn stares into the peaceful swirling black hole.

scenes.heading: 96 TAXES UNIVERSE: INT. LAUNDROMAT 96
scenes.summary: Waymond tells Evelyn that Deirdre is giving them another week for a final meeting and cuts her zip tie, while Jobu urges Evelyn to ignore him and come back to the Bagel.

scenes.heading: 97 MOVIE STAR UNIVERSE: EXT. MOVIE THEATER ALLEY 97
scenes.summary: CEO Waymond takes a final drag from his cigarette and tells Evelyn that her father was right that he was too sweet for his own good, while in the Action Universe Alpha Jumpers point weapons at Evelyn as wounded Waymond stumbles between them pleading for everyone to stop fighting.

scenes.heading: 98 MOVIE STAR UNIVERSE: EXT. MOVIE THEATER ALLEY 98
scenes.summary: CEO Waymond tells Evelyn that he knows the world is cruel and they're running in circles, having lived on earth as long as she has.

scenes.heading: 99 ACTION UNIVERSE: INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR ATRIUM 99
scenes.summary: Waymond tells the Alpha Jumpers that he's confused too but knows they have to be kind, especially when they don't know what's going on.

scenes.heading: 100 TAXES UNIVERSE: INT. LAUNDROMAT 100
scenes.summary: CEO Waymond explains in voiceover that choosing to see the good side is strategic and necessary for survival, while in the Taxes Universe Waymond hums and dances while sweeping and Evelyn notices the untouched cookies and the googly-eyed baseball bat smiling at her.
scenes.turningPointNote: Evelyn sees Waymond's kindness philosophy embodied in the googly eyes; the emotional turning point toward choosing connection over nihilism

scenes.heading: 101 ACTION UNIVERSE: INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR ATRIUM 101
scenes.summary: Wounded Alpha Jumpers surround Evelyn with weapons raised while Jobu tells her she can still turn around and avoid all this.

scenes.heading: 101 BACK IN THE IRS: 101
scenes.summary: Evelyn tells Waymond it's too late, but he insists she not say that; she looks at her bleeding husband as romantic music begins to play, then turns away from the Bagel and hugs Waymond hard.
scenes.turningPointNote: Evelyn chooses Waymond and life over the Bagel's nihilistic pull; the emotional climax of her arc

scenes.heading: 101 ACTION UNIVERSE: Evelyn takes Waymond’s hand, we hear a 101
scenes.summary: Evelyn takes Waymond's hand and sees abstract shots of him throughout the multiverse—ecstatic, overwhelmed, crying while laughing, bored—seeing a complete vision of her husband for the first time since falling in love.

scenes.heading: 102 MOVIE STAR UNIVERSE: EXT. MOVIE THEATER ALLEY 102
scenes.summary: CEO Waymond tells Evelyn that even though she's broken his heart again, in another life he would have really liked just doing laundry and taxes with her, then turns to go.

scenes.heading: 103 TAXES UNIVERSE: INT. LAUNDROMAT 103
scenes.summary: Holding Waymond in the laundromat, Evelyn can't look away from him; when he asks what's wrong, she says at peace that nothing is wrong.

scenes.heading: 106 ACTION UNIVERSE: INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR ATRIUM 106
scenes.summary: The Alpha Jumpers lower their weapons seeing Evelyn and Waymond as non-threatening, but Jobu grabs Evelyn's arm and pulls her away from Waymond, flashing them back to the Temple Universe by the Bagel.

scenes.heading: 106 BACK IN THE IRS: 106
scenes.summary: Jobu asks Evelyn why she'd want to be in the IRS; Evelyn looks at Waymond and smiles, saying she doesn't know, but Jobu warns that good feelings eventually go away, then uses the hand vagina trick to summon the Bagel into the IRS building.

scenes.heading: 107 VARIOUS UNIVERSES: DEIRDRE’S LIVES 107
scenes.summary: Evelyn steps outside the laundromat to find Deirdre vaping; Deirdre offers her a drag and mentions Waymond told her about Evelyn's situation, recalling her own divorce when she drove her ex's car through the neighbors' kitchen.

scenes.heading: 107 TAXES UNIVERSE: EXT. LAUNDROMAT 107
scenes.summary: Evelyn tells Deirdre she isn't unlovable and that there's always something to love, even in a universe with hot dogs for fingers they'd be good with their feet, then disarms Bagel Deirdre using her toes and pulls her into a hug.

scenes.heading: 107 TAXES UNIVERSE: Evelyn is hugging Deirdre who is clearly 107
scenes.summary: Evelyn hugs an uncomfortable Deirdre in the Taxes Universe while in the IRS Bagel Deirdre breaks down emotionally; in the Hot Dog Universe Evelyn uses her toes to begin the mating ritual with an overjoyed Deirdre, and in the Action Universe Deirdre collapses, pulls out her ear pieces, and gives Evelyn a knowing nod.

scenes.heading: 107 FLASH: TAXES UNIVERSE: EXT. LAUNDROMAT - She reaches down to 107
scenes.summary: Evelyn plucks a googly eye from the baseball bat, turning bullets into googly eyes that she sticks to her forehead and sends flying to stick on guns, helmets, and monitors; in the Rock Universe Evelyn Rock jiggles and reveals googly eyes stuck to herself.

scenes.heading: 108 MOVIE STAR UNIVERSE: EXT. MOVIE THEATER STREET CORNER 108
scenes.summary: Evelyn chases CEO Waymond through a crowd and slams into her Kung Fu Master, who taunts her with the cookie; Evelyn says she's ready to chase a different cookie and attempts to take the Master's knife.

scenes.heading: 109 ACTION UNIVERSE: INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR ATRIUM 109
scenes.summary: Evelyn successfully pulls her Master's knife from her hand, turns it into one of Waymond's smiley face cookies and shoves it in the Master's mouth, then knocks out her ear pieces; Jobu tries to escape but Evelyn ties herself to her daughter using Jobu's coat belt.

scenes.heading: 110 NOODLE UNIVERSE: INT. BOILING POT 110
scenes.summary: In the Noodle Universe, Evelyn Spaghetti reaches down into the boiling pot to grab her macaroni son and lift him off the bottom, declaring it's throwing day and her baby noodle boy will stick.

scenes.heading: 111 ACTION UNIVERSE: INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR ATRIUM 111
scenes.summary: Evelyn yanks out Debbie the Dog Mom's ear pieces and gestures for her to leave; someone grabs Evelyn's hair but she turns it into spaghetti to free herself, then throws the spaghetti at Jobu who slips on it and stumbles down the stairs.

scenes.heading: 111 ACTION UNIVERSE: Evelyn control’s Chad’s body using his hair. 111
scenes.summary: Evelyn controls Chad's body using his hair and whispers to him in both universes that they are all useless alone but together can save his Raccoon; Chad fights back tears.

scenes.heading: 111 ACTION UNIVERSE: Slow Motion: Evelyn, riding on Chad’s 111
scenes.summary: Riding on Chad's shoulders, Evelyn charges at a wall of Followers and Alphas, leaving them strewn across the floor in various stages of emotional release, but she tumbles from Chad's shoulders and is pinned to the banister by Alpha Gong Gong's mechanical arms.

scenes.heading: 112 TAXES UNIVERSE: INT. LAUNDROMAT 112
scenes.summary: Evelyn rushes to Gong Gong who angrily tells her not to call him father and that no daughter of his would act this way or live in such a run-down laundromat.

scenes.heading: 113 ACTION UNIVERSE: INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR ATRIUM 113
scenes.summary: Evelyn watches Jobu climb toward the Bagel while flashing through universes where they struggle as noodles, Evelyn catches CEO Waymond in a crowd, and she steers Chad chasing an animal control truck.

scenes.heading: 114 ACTION UNIVERSE: INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR ATRIUM 114
scenes.summary: Alpha Gong Gong crushes Evelyn against the banister while she watches Jobu hesitate in front of the Bagel; Evelyn asks her father how he could let her go.

scenes.heading: 115 TAXES UNIVERSE: INT. LAUNDROMAT 115
scenes.summary: Evelyn tells Gong Gong she spent years trying to see things through his eyes but is finally finding courage to see through her own, and it's okay if he can't be proud because she finally is.

scenes.heading: 116 ACTION UNIVERSE: INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR ATRIUM 116
scenes.summary: Evelyn tells Gong Gong she will no longer do to her daughter what he did to her; Alpha Gong Gong loosens his grip and Evelyn breaks free, grabbing Jobu's wrist just as she's about to enter the Bagel.
scenes.turningPointNote: Evelyn breaks the cycle of parental rejection by standing up to Gong Gong and physically stopping Jobu from entering the Bagel

scenes.heading: 116 FLASH: ACTION UNIVERSE: Jobu turns and looks at her mother. 116
scenes.summary: Jobu turns and looks at her mother as Evelyn walks Becky and Jobu to Gong Gong.

scenes.heading: 117 ROCK UNIVERSE: EXT. FIELD 117
scenes.summary: Evelyn Rock moves closer to Jobu Rock, who declares she can't take anymore emotionally manipulative bullshit and wiggles away, starting a rock chase.

scenes.heading: 118 VARIOUS UNIVERSES: 118
scenes.summary: Jobu attacks Evelyn in the Action Universe and Evelyn blocks each blow as they flash through different scenarios.

scenes.heading: INT. COURTROOM: Judge Jobu grabs the gavel and swings it at
scenes.summary: Judge Jobu swings a gavel at Lawyer Evelyn who blocks it, turning the gavel into flowers; Jobu says maybe Evelyn wins in this universe but in another she beats her, then lands several hits as kung fu warriors before Evelyn pushes her away.

scenes.heading: INT. JAIL: They charge each other and right as they hit each
scenes.summary: In a jail universe, Jobu and Evelyn charge each other.

scenes.heading: EXT. BACKYARD: They are swinging piñatas again.
scenes.summary: (no summary)

scenes.heading: 118 ACTION UNIVERSE: Suddenly Evelyn and Jobu stop moving. Two 118
scenes.summary: (no summary)

scenes.heading: 118 ACTION UNIVERSE: INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR ATRIUM 118
scenes.summary: (no summary)

scenes.heading: 119 TAXES UNIVERSE: EXT. LAUNDROMAT 119
scenes.summary: (no summary)

scenes.heading: 120 ACTION UNIVERSE: INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR ATRIUM 120
scenes.summary: (no summary)

scenes.heading: 121 ROCK UNIVERSE: EXT. FIELD 121
scenes.summary: Jobu Rock tips over the edge of a cliff and tumbles away while Evelyn Rock watches from above.

scenes.heading: 122 TAXES UNIVERSE: EXT. LAUNDROMAT 122
scenes.summary: Evelyn stops Joy from leaving and tells her she's getting fat, never calls, only visits when she needs something, and questions why she would want to be here with her despite Joy being right that it doesn't make sense.
scenes.turningPointNote: Evelyn begins to articulate her choice to stay with Joy despite all the reasons not to, marking a crucial shift in their relationship and Evelyn's acceptance of this universe.

scenes.heading: 122 TAXES UNIVERSE: EXT. LAUNDROMAT 122
scenes.summary: Joy rests her head on Evelyn's shoulder and sighs in relief while Evelyn studies the moment, noticing Waymond, Becky, and guests watching from the laundromat before Joy comments on feeling awkward.

scenes.heading: 123 INT. APARTMENT - MORNING 123
scenes.summary: Evelyn and Waymond load papers into a folder at their apartment table when Joy emerges from the bathroom saying they're late, and Evelyn thanks Joy for coming before Joy leaves with Waymond.

scenes.heading: 124 EXT. IRS BUILDING - MORNING 124
scenes.summary: The family exits Becky's car at the IRS building entrance and Evelyn stops Becky to tell her she needs to grow more hair, which deeply moves Becky.

scenes.heading: 125 INT. IRS LOBBY - MOMENTS LATER 125
scenes.summary: Waymond holds Evelyn's hand as they walk down the IRS hallway with Joy pushing Gong Gong behind them, then Evelyn pulls Waymond back and they kiss sweetly.

scenes.heading: 126 INT. IRS 9TH FLOOR OFFICE - LATER 126
scenes.summary: Evelyn holds Waymond's hand and waits with serene patience as Deirdre lists their new infractions, distracted and happy when Deirdre asks if she heard the question.
